description: Perform a suitability analysis to identify developable land by excluding restricted zones. Using the land parcels from /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson and radar stations from /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson, identify areas that are at least 1 kilometer (1000 meters) away from the radar stations. Ensure analysis is performed using EPSG:32610 (WGS 84 / UTM zone 10N). Export the resulting developable areas to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/developable_areas.geojson in GeoJSON format.
